Plot method for partially observed functional regression fits

plot.po_fit.Rd

Displays an estimated functional coefficient of a po_fit object together with its pointwise confidence band.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'po_fit'
plot(x, beta_index = 1, ...)

Arguments

x

an object of class po_fit, as returned by po_fit.

beta_index

an integer selecting which functional coefficient to plot. Default is 1.

...

currently ignored, included for compatibility with the generic.

Value

A ggplot2 object displaying the estimated coefficient and its confidence band.

See also

po_fit

Examples

# \donttest{
if (requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)) {
  set.seed(42)
  data <- data_generator_po_1d(N = 100)
  grid <- seq(0, 1, length.out = ncol(data$X_se))
  fit <- po_fit(y ~ ffpo(X_se, grid = grid), data = data)
  plot(fit)
}
#> Warning: unused arguments ignored for current version: N
#> Error in seq.default(0, 1, length.out = ncol(data$X_se)): 'length.out' must be of length 1
# }
